steps.t: Myve, the child who seemed to covet the shiny toy, is somewhere in Galtrev. You should speak with Myve to see if she is hiding the shiny ball from its…
Someone who may have witnessed the pilfering of Envus's toy would likely be in Galtrev. You should look around and see if anyone saw someone make off …
The crow that stole the ball was seen flying to the north-west. You should head north-west to try and recover Envus' favourite toy.
